subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: Compliance with C2P1 for main drains and branch drains is verified if (2) to (4) are complied with.

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: Sanitary drainage pipework shall be sized in accordance with AS 2200 and C2V1.

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: The following limitations shall be applied:

ol.li: The size of the drain shall be of nominal size as specified in Table 3.4.1 of AS/NZS 3500.2.
The minimum size of a main drain shall be as per Clause 3.3.2 of AS/NZS 3500.2.
The minimum size of a branch drain shall be as per Clause 3.3.3 of AS/NZS 3500.2.
Not more than 2 water closet pans shall be connected to a vented DN 80 branch drain.

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: When using the Colebrook-White equation provided in AS 2200—

ol.li: minimum and maximum pipe grades shall be designed such that (2) is satisfied; and
the filling degree shall be designed such that (2) is satisfied; and
the flowrate of the designed drain must be greater than or equal to that determined in accordance with C2V3; and

unless alternative values are appropriate, the design values must be—
1.5 mm for pipe roughness; and
1.01 x 10-6 m2s-1 for kinematic viscosity.
